name: claude-marketplace
description: Claude Code plugin marketplace. One URL to configure; all team and platform skills flow from here.

plugins.name: essentials
plugins.description: Curated starter pack — install this first. TDD, debugging, planning, git worktrees (superpowers); 7-phase feature dev; 6-agent parallel PR review.

plugins.name: platform-verified
plugins.description: The full catalog: 149 skills, 58 agents, 72 commands from 11 vendored sources — superpowers, gstack, compound-engineering, getshitdone, ruflo, obsidian, anthropic suite, and more.

plugins.name: hello-marketplace
plugins.description: Smoke-test plugin — confirms the marketplace is wired up correctly.
